title: K000150178: Performing a ConfigSync using the Configuration utility

metadata.f5_title: Performing a ConfigSync using the Configuration utility
metadata.excerpt: In this video, AskF5 shows you how to perform a configuration synchronization (ConfigSync) using the Configuration utility.

content.sfdetails__c:
In this video, AskF5 shows you how to perform a configuration synchronization (ConfigSync) using the Configuration utility.

This demo uses BIG-IP 15.0.0.
